headline: Hedge-Fund Managers Are Minting Money Off This AI Trade
summary: Bank of America’s stock-trading team summed up recent moves in AI this way in a February note to clients: “Semis > Software has been the YTD (and frankly 2025) trade.”  Analog Century Management, a hedge-fund firm run by physicist Val Zlatev: Its main hedge fund is up about 17% this year through February, people familiar with the matter said.  Positions in semiconductor capital equipment stocks such as Applied Materials and memory-chip makers such as Micron Technology did well.
